reasoning: Focus on lactate clearance by incorporating over-under intervals. Your last ride was at a lower intensity, so it's crucial to elevate your effort to mimic the demands of the Alpine Loop. This session targets lactate clearance, boosting fatigue resistance for the Sundance to Cascade Springs segment.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 6x 6-minute over-unders: 2 min at 242W, 2 min at 201W, 2 min at 256W

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
